title: halimium alyssoides
intro: Halimium alyssoides, also known as rockrose or 'alpine cistus', is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its pink to white flowers and woody stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. The health benefits of Halimium alyssoides include its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
